{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blackflame Truegolds
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Forty-eight of the strongest [[Blackflame Truegolds]] were gathered on the deck of the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
